Left winner: I win, C none, AND none, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT none, OR-NOT none

Longest Left: I 2-0 3-1 4-2 5-3 6-4 7-5 0-6 1-7 complete

8 + 8 = 16 > 8
Right will be truncated to length 8 - 8 = 0
